ksa_text: Skill in communicating AI test results to technical and non-technical stakeholders, including limitation documentation and clear go/no-go recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of systems testing and evaluation tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-005 (RM, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4950 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.495, eu_ai_act=0.470, dcwf=0.423) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4950 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-S-005 (composite 0.4950) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.4950 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.4950 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4950, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
